title: Streaky Bacon Marinated Azucarado Tacos
description: This citrusy, crispy, hangover-cure Mexican dish features streaky bacon in a flavorful marinade, making it an ideal mediterranean-friendly option for a mid-morning snack or meal.
instructions: Mix together lime juice, lemon juice, orange juice, dijon mustard, garlic powder, cumin, salt, and pepper in a shallow dish. Add streaky bacon pieces and marinate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Place the marinated bacon on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake for about 15-20 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
While the bacon is cooking, heat tortillas in a dry skillet over medium heat for about 30 seconds each side to lightly toast them.
Assemble tacos by spreading a little bacon grease on the bottom of each tortilla. Place some marinated bacon slices on top of the grease and add any additional toppings like chopped cilantro.
